race.comment: Former Victorian KIWI RAIDER (9) is having her first run for the new stable but should find this easier than what she was contesting down south. Tuned up for this with a recent trial win and gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim. Respect from the Gollan camp. THE SOUR (14) has been right there in all three runs this campaign and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley. Looms as the main danger. FAR BEYOND (7) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but go on the solid Sunny Coast win when resuming. Worth another chance. STEFFI ELECTRICA (13) will be ready to peak now third-up from the break and may trouble the judge with any luck from the sticky draw. FORTYSECONDSTREET (12) next best.
